Let's dive a little deeper into what that entails. During the course, you'll be asked to identify one specific persuasion challenge that you are or will be facing that is especially pressing or difficult. It can involve optimizing your credibility with potential clients, getting leaders in your organization to buy in to your proposals. It can involve marketing or selling a product and any other situation that could benefit from greater persuasive skills. We're going to ask you to use as much detail as possible when completing the exercise form we will provide, such as who's involved in the situation with you? What do you hope to accomplish there? What are your goals? What barriers exist to obtaining a positive outcome that are resisting your attempts to achieve your goals? And finally, what are some solutions to the problem that you've already tried? This scenario will be the foundation for constructing an immediately applicable persuasion plan. After each module, you'll be given the opportunity to apply what you've learned in that module to your personal persuasion challenge. And by the end of the course, you will have a detailed action plan to help you handle your current challenge, as well as, and this is so important, as well as a method for handling your future influence challenges. The future is crucial. As Socrates stated, education is not the filling of a vessel, it is the kindling of a flame. I hope you'll enjoy this controlled burn of a truly hot learning experience.
